name: Medium Expedition
description: A party moving through terrain, mid-stride composition.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A party of figures moving through the terrain, mid-journey.
{setting}. Travellers in transit, the path stretching behind them.
{setting}. A group on the move, framed against the landscape they cross.

2: {subject}, foreground, leading, facing away from camera.

background_pool: A mountain switchback trail cutting across a steep grassy slope, scree and loose rock bordering the path, distant peaks visible beyond the figures, wildflowers clinging to the hillside, late afternoon light casting long shadows
A dense forest path of packed earth and exposed roots, shafts of sunlight breaking through the canopy overhead, ferns and moss covering the ground to either side, the trail curving out of sight ahead
A desert canyon passage, smooth sandstone walls narrowing around a sandy floor, the trail winding between boulders, heat distortion in the air, a sliver of intense blue sky overhead

A snow-covered ridge line, wind-sculpted drifts and exposed rock, boot prints trailing behind the figures, the white expanse stretching to grey clouds on the horizon, ice crystals catching the low sun
action_pool: mid-stride, weight forward on the uphill foot
consulting a compass in their palm
reaching back to help the person behind
pausing to scan the trail ahead
trudging, shoulders rounded under the weight
unwrapping a scarf in the heat
planting a walking stick firmly in front
